description: This source file defines a Kotlin class 'BiometricAuthenticator' that provides a wrapper around Android's biometric authentication APIs. It includes methods for checking biometric availability and prompting the user for biometric authentication with fallback options.

classes.name: BiometricAuthenticator
classes.description: A Kotlin class that wraps biometric authentication logic, providing methods to check availability and to show biometric prompts.

classes.name: BiometricAuthenticator.Availability
classes.description: A sealed class representing whether biometric authentication is available or not.

methods.name: availability
methods.description: Checks whether biometric/device-credential authentication is available on the device.

methods.name: authenticate
methods.description: Displays a biometric prompt to the user with specified title and subtitle, handling success, failure, and error callbacks.
